name: Bike Attack Race - Bike Racing Game

reviews.review_description: This has so bad quality and looks like a trash mobile game don’t buy this

this bike attack race game is very nice action and race in one game. I would say to add more highways, modes and exciting in the missions. Also add some new bike and riders. I want to see moto racing experience in this game. Overall game experience is good.

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thank you so much for your feedback. We'll incorporate your suggestions in coming updates.
